mapper.select: SELECT p.ID, p.PAGE_NAME, p.PAGE_LABEL, p.DISPLAY_MODE, p.PAGE_SORT, p.CREATE_TIME, p.UPDATE_TIME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = p.CREATE_USER) AS CREATE_USERNAME, (SELECT u.USERNAME FROM user u WHERE u.ID = p.UPDATE_USER) AS UPDATE_USERNAME FROM page p WHERE p.ID = #{pageId}
